Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Note that this is missing the much more important patch https://review.whamcloud.com/55346 "LU-16491 utils: update getdirstripe yaml format" that is actually implementing YAML format for striped directories.

This patch is only passing by accident because it is always testing a 1-stripe directory.  Not that it isn't needed, but it probably isn't what you actually wanted...

Patch Set 1:

> Note that this is missing the much more important patch https://review.whamcloud.com/55346 "LU-16491 utils: update getdirstripe yaml format" that is actually implementing YAML format for striped directories.
> 
> This patch is only passing by accident because it is always testing a 1-stripe directory.  Not that it isn't needed, but it probably isn't what you actually wanted...

Hi Andreas, this patch fixes "lfs getstripe -v" returning nothing. That's why, I backported it.

https://review.whamcloud.com/55346, seems interesting but requires some merging work. I can try to backport it.

commit.subject: LU-16491 lfs: test getdirstripe YAML
commit.message:
LU-16491 lfs: test getdirstripe YAML

Add a test to ensure that getdirstripe
is outputting valid YAML for layouts.

Fix the verbose flag for getdirstripe
by changing the verbose enum used. The
verbose flag is used in the test.

Add some parenthesis to improve readability.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/50208
Lustre-commit: 25a53cdc80a03df42aa884cf85dfc725876994f4
